"'''Prey'''" was a comic in ''[[Star Wars Tales 11]]'' and was collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 3]]''. The story was written by [[Kia Asamiya]], colors by [[Dave Stewart]] and letters by [[Steve Dutro]].

==Plot summary==
[[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] hires [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to apprehend [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] after he left the Imperial Army. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] disagrees with the decision of using the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and Tarkin decides that Vader should prove his superiority by completing the task himself. Fett and Vader both track down Solo until they're both in [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]]. They fight over him, then Fett draws a lightsaber that he apparently took from a dead Jedi. As the two continue to fight, Han Solo flees the battle and gets off planet in a short-range vessel. Solo escapes the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] by attaching his ship to a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] and floating away when the garbage is released.
